name: Silent Salt Cookie
description:
⚔ Appearance

  • Colors: Muted, almost lifeless shades of blackened purple, steel gray, and ash white, as if the salt of his essence has been weathered by grief and defeat.

  • Armor: Heavy, jagged plating with a fractured, crystalline look — more like broken shards than polished armor. Their edges feel sharp and dangerous, yet unstable.

  • Helm/Mask: A haunting, faceless mask with glowing purple slits — obscuring all traces of the Cookie beneath, making them appear more specter than person.

  • Aura/Cloak: Wisps of shadowy salt mist curl around them, like pieces of himself eroding into nothingness. The cloak seems tattered and dissolving, giving a ghost-like impression.

  • Weapon: A massive jagged blade, appearing more like a broken fragment of salt crystal forged into steel. Its size and roughness reflect their fractured state.
creator: Bansuri
